sections: HCM-1.4 — Profile-aware setup and doctor decisions
HCM-0.6 exact shipped kind and root-profile data
HCM-1.4 profile-aware setup and doctor decision proof gate
reviewed dependency, implementation, and proof evidence

repo_truth: Fresh read-only Review 10 of the exact twenty-five-file eight-times-remediated HCM-1.4 planning subject plus one non-authoritative interrupted Review 8 stop. Reviews 1-7 and 9 returned Required findings; the parent remediated each complete round in docs only. Review 8 returned no verdict and remains non-authoritative. Review 9 found that mandatory compiler Windows proof was impossible because author/mod.rs failed on unconditional LOCK_EX while that file was forbidden, and that capability reports overclaimed complete registry closure. The current packet admits only an exact behavior-preserving author lock-call portability hunk with HIGH-impact warning/MSVC/47/22 proof, and narrows capability reporting to the exact four-field identity projection while leaving bindings/cardinality/validators/rules registry-owned. All nine predecessor dispatches and ten proof/remediation/stop walls are manifested. Independently derive a complete verdict; inherit no approval.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the sorted twenty-five-entry manifest and aggregate fingerprint before review.
Review every byte of 00, 04, 06, current SPEC/plan/unchecked todo, all ten proof/remediation/stop walls, and all nine predecessor immutable dispatches.

Read unchanged control-pack authority, landed HCM-0.6 condition definition/decision, HCM-1.1/HCM-1.2/HCM-1.3 source/tests/records, live setup/doctor/author-lock/route-state/CLI/profile/condition/registry code, Cargo manifests, package proof, CI, and official dependency docs only as needed.

Run bounded read-only Markdown, link, Git, handoff/schema, condition-semantic-precedence, API compile-feasibility, exact Windows portability-hunk feasibility, setup/doctor error-table closure, capability-projection ceiling, inspection status/reason, exact allowlist, TDD-ordering, author-regression, package/source-tree, cross-platform, compatibility, determinism, and security checks.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence through the built-in channel; do not treat the interrupted Review 8 attempt as a verdict.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.

No Rust, Cargo, runtime/product, production authoring, reset repair, condition evidence/evaluator, compiler publication, CI, canonical content, HCM-2+, SDK, Tauri, Substrate, adapter, contract, or dock implementation.

Do not infer an unspecified evidence producer, API field/type, error precedence, inspection pair, compatibility bridge, reset transaction, publication change, platform proof, final HCM-4 DTO, content authority, or later-slice behavior.
Do not treat either parent remediation or predecessor review as approval.
tasks: Invoke required skills in order, remain read-only, replay the exact twenty-five-entry manifest/aggregate, and return BLOCKED if any byte differs.
Review findings first in Critical, Required, Optional, Nit order with severity, exact file/line, violated gate, concrete failure, smallest remediation, and invalidated proof.
Re-verify every Review 1-7 remedy from live authority/source and that Review 8 remains a non-authoritative interrupted stop.

Re-verify Review 9 Windows closure: current compiler MSVC LOCK_EX failure is a genuine RED; the exact allowed author/mod.rs signature move preserves Unix flock(LOCK_EX)/retry and non-Unix no-op; fresh HIGH-risk warning, exact hunk equality, compiler MSVC GREEN, actual Windows setup runtime, and complete 47/22 author suites are feasible; no other authoring change is admitted.

Re-verify Review 9 capability closure: ProfileCapabilityTruth/Row expose exactly instance ID, capability ID, contract ref, and contract fingerprint; setup/doctor equality and claims stop there; required bindings, allowed cardinality, instance binding maps, semantic validators, and binding rules remain registry-owned and are not copied or claimed.

Review all engine/compiler code blocks, algorithms, allowlists, TDD ordering, serialization, errors, status precedence, mutation boundaries, custom injection, default shipped resolution, inspection projection, author fixtures, and CLI mapping for any remaining implementation-time choice or live-source incompatibility.

Verify complete focused/sibling/workspace/engine-package/compiler-source-tree/actual-Windows/security/determinism/scope/handoff/GitNexus proof is feasible and no mandatory proof needs another forbidden file/dependency.

Verify control-pack cross-document consistency and classification ceiling, todo unchecked, docs-only current mutations, immutable remediation lineage, final review/two-commit closeout, and no condition-evaluator/content/reset-publication/HCM-2 activation.
Return CLEAN only if there is no valid Critical or Required finding; otherwise CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Make no edits and use bounded checks rather than indefinite waits.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest/aggregate, required authority, live source, or mandatory read-only verification cannot be reproduced.

Return CHANGES_REQUIRED rather than inventing evidence authority, API fields, request/error precedence, inspection pairs, authoring behavior, compatibility, reset transaction, publication, platform proof, content authority, or later-slice decisions.
Return to the parent if remediation would require Rust/runtime work, broader control-pack authority, HCM-2+, or global handoff/ledger mutation.
